LanguageData.SA_Enabled_Desc: Automatically allow forbidden items based on category rules.
LanguageData.SA_WaitForCombat_Desc: Hold auto-allow during active raids. Items are allowed once all hostiles are down or gone.
LanguageData.SA_HomeZoneOnly_Desc: Only auto-allow items within your home zone.
LanguageData.SA_DoubleForbidHint: Tip: Forbid an item twice to permanently keep it forbidden. Smart Allow will stop touching it.
